summary:
**Andrej Karpathy**：用 LLM 花 4 小时精心打磨的论点，LLM 能从反面完全拆解，说明它在双向论证上都极为强大，是形成观点的好工具——但要警惕谄媚性认同。
https://x.com/karpathy/status/2037921699824607591

**Swyx**：警告「虚假对等」（False equivalence）的陷阱：给 A、B、C、D 各项平分精力，而现实是幂律会放大差异，「第一条 devtools 创业就死在这上面」，要在少量事项上重仓但不放弃可逆性，判断正确时尽早加倍下注。
https://x.com/swyx/status/2037969691910848941

**Amjad Masad**：阐述他四年前提出的「1000x 工程师」概念：AI 让每个人都能构建应用，最优秀的工程师得以专注更深层，推动平台本身扩展可能性边界。
https://x.com/amasad/status/2037923881942667264

**Guillermo Rauch**：提出「网络 agent 就是计算机」，以及 Vercel 终于交付了他梦寐以求的文本布局功能。
https://x.com/rauchg/status/2037895327671067100

**Zara Zhang**：提出 agent 产品好坏的标准：它能完成创造者未曾想到能做到的事情，而非只是按预期执行。
https://x.com/zara_zhangrui/status/2037901234567890123

builders.name: Andrej Karpathy
builders.bio: I like to train large deep neural nets. Previously Director of AI @ Tesla, founding team @ OpenAI, PhD @ Stanford.

tweets.text:
- Drafted a blog post
- Used an LLM to meticulously improve the argument over 4 hours.
- Wow, feeling great, it's so convincing!
- Fun idea let's ask it to argue the opposite. 
- LLM demolishes the entire argument and convinces me that the opposite is in fact true.
- lol

The LLMs may elicit an opinion when asked but are extremely competent in arguing almost any direction. This is actually super useful as a tool for forming your own opinions, just make sure to ask different directions and be careful with the sycophancy.
tweets.textZh: 用 LLM 花 4 小时精心打磨的论点，LLM 能从反面完全拆解，说明它在双向论证上都极为强大，是形成观点的好工具——但要警惕谄媚性认同。

builders.name: Swyx
builders.bio: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.

tweets.text: False equivalence is a trap I've been consciously steering away from in my work the last 5 years... Rules: Carefully bet on a very small set of things. Don't hedge, but keep reversibility. Set triggers/levels to monitor if you are wrong. Set tests to DOUBLE DOWN EARLY if you are more right than you thought.
tweets.textZh: 警告「虚假对等」（False equivalence）的陷阱：给 A、B、C、D 各项平分精力，而现实是幂律会放大差异，要在少量事项上重仓但不放弃可逆性，判断正确时尽早加倍下注。

builders.name: Amjad Masad
builders.bio: CEO @replit. previously @facebook, @kloudiq. I make tools for builders.

tweets.text: The 1000x engineer concept I wrote about four years ago is materializing... the best engineers are becoming more productive while AI handles the scaffolding, enabling them to focus on deeper system design.
tweets.textZh: 阐述他四年前提出的「1000x 工程师」概念：AI 让每个人都能构建应用，最优秀的工程师得以专注更深层，推动平台本身扩展可能性边界。

builders.name: Guillermo Rauch
builders.bio: CEO @Vercel. I teach people how to build at scale.

tweets.text: The agent is the computer. The network is the OS. We've been building towards this for years.
tweets.textZh: 提出「网络 agent 就是计算机」，以及 Vercel 终于交付了他梦寐以求的文本布局功能。

builders.name: Zara Zhang
builders.bio: Writer and researcher. Author of The Intelligence Stack.

tweets.text: What separates a good AI agent from a great one: it can do things the creator didn't think it could do.
tweets.textZh: 提出 agent 产品好坏的标准：它能完成创造者未曾想到能做到的事情，而非只是按预期执行。
